options.text: How long does approval usually take?
我什么时候才能收到报销的钱?

content.explanation: 正确答案：How long does approval usually take？这是一个合适的问题，因为它询问了审批周期。其他选项不正确，因为它们没有直接询问审批周期或时间信息。
content.scenarioHint: 你想问工作人员关于报销审批的什么问题?

options.text: When will I get the money?
How long does it take to get the money?
What's the purpose of the report?
Can you help me with my tax return?

content.explanation: 答案解析：正确答案"When will I get the money?"是最合适的提问方式，因为它直接询问到账时间。其他选项虽然语法正确，但不符合该场景的需求。
content.scenarioHint: 员工询问报销审批周期和到账时间

options.text: You should hear back by Friday, since it’s usually 3–5 business days.
It’s already late, so it won’t be approved this month.
You need to resubmit it because Tuesday is a bad day to file.
Approval only happens if you email your manager directly.

content.explanation: 正确答案合理推算提交后3–5个工作日，符合职场常规。干扰项1制造恐慌，无依据；干扰项2错误地认为提交日影响审批，且暗示流程有歧视；干扰项3错误地将流程与是否发邮件挂钩，混淆了标准流程。
content.speakerText: I submitted my expense report last Tuesday. When should I expect approval?
content.speakerTextCn: 我上周二提交了报销单，我什么时候能等到审批？
